title: War Horns!
description: Unleash the echoes of battle! Play powerful war horns from history and fantasy, from the mighty Carnyx to the legendary horns of Middle-earth.
body:
# War Horns!  

Heya! Ever played a medieval-themed modpack with friends, only to find it lacking a way to announce the arrival of your bloodthirsty armies? War Horns lets you do exactly that! This mod features a collection of playable horns inspired by history and fantasy. From the **Carnyx** to the iconic horns of *The Lord of the Rings*.

This mod is purely sound-based—no extra mechanics, just epic horn calls that resonate across the land. Whether rallying allies or striking fear into foes.

## ✨Showcase Video

## 🔨 Some Crafting Recipes  

### Horn of Hope  
*A call to newfound courage.*  
![2 bones, 2 torches, 1 feather](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a42359457aa415c38d0ff656c831ba89faf15bdf.png) 

### Horn of Pompeii  
*A mournful blast from a forgotten cataclysm.*  
![2 copper ingots, 3 gold nuggets](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c37048226752715a8aff3606759dd494ed8d537b.png)

### Horn of Oordor  
*A dark call of dominion.*

![2 bones, 2 gold ingots, 1 wither skeleton skull](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2335ac7c207ffe0205d5f4ed545c81548c1b9710.png)
